parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "agent_name": "{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.name }}",
  "voice_id": "{{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.voice_id }}",
  "language": "en-US",
  
  "response_engine": {
    "type": "retell-llm",
    "llm_id": "{{ $json.llm_id }}"
  },
  
  "voice_temperature": 1,
  "voice_speed": 1,
  "volume": 1,
  "responsiveness": 1,
  "interruption_sensitivity": 1,
  
  "normalize_for_speech": false,
  
  "end_call_after_silence_ms": 60000,
  "max_call_duration_ms": 600000,
  
  "enable_voicemail_detection": true,
  "voicemail_message": "Hi, please give us a callback.",
  "voicemail_option": {
    "action": {
      "type": "hangup"
    }
  },
  
  "analysis_summary_prompt": "Summarize the outcome of the conversation in five sentences.",
  
  "begin_message_delay_ms": 5000,
  "ring_duration_ms": 9000
}

fieldValues.fieldValue: I couldn’t find the phone number for that country to call.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "response_engine": {
    "type": "retell-llm",
    "llm_id": "{{ $json.llm_id }}"
  },
  "voice_id": "openai-Marissa",
  "agent_name": "{{ $('Get many rows').item.json.name }}",
  "voice_temperature": 1,
  "voice_speed": 1,
  "volume": 1,
  "responsiveness": 1,
  "interruption_sensitivity": 1,
  "enable_backchannel": true,
  "backchannel_frequency": 0.9,
  "backchannel_words": [
    "yeah",
    "uh-huh"
  ],
  "language": "en-US",
  "normalize_for_speech": true,
  "end_call_after_silence_ms": 60000,
  "max_call_duration_ms": 600000,
  "enable_voicemail_detection": true,
  "voicemail_message": "Hi, please give us a callback.",
  "analysis_summary_prompt": "Summarize the outcome of the conversation in five sentences.",
  "begin_message_delay_ms": 1000
}
